name: Fusion Manager
description: Documenta, diagnostica y gestiona escenarios de Adobe Workfront Fusion. Genera diagramas de flujo, analiza blueprints, detecta errores y produce documentacion tecnica lista para compartir con tu equipo.
author: QStrauss

agentSeeds..qaio/routines/routines.json: [{"id": "weekly-scenario-health", "name": "Weekly scenario health check", "description": "Every Monday: review all active Fusion scenarios for errors, warnings, and performance issues.", "prompt": "Run a health check on all active Fusion scenarios. Check execution logs for the past 7 days. Flag: scenarios with error rate > 5%, scenarios that havent run in 7+ days, scenarios with average execution time > 60s. Summarize findings and recommend fixes.", "schedule": "0 9 * * 1", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z"}, {"id": "monthly-docs-refresh", "name": "Monthly documentation refresh", "description": "1st of every month: regenerate documentation for all scenarios that changed since last refresh.", "prompt": "Check which Fusion scenarios have been modified since the last documentation run. For each changed scenario: regenerate the flow diagram, update the data mapping, refresh the blueprint analysis. Save updated docs to docs/{scenario-name}/.", "schedule": "0 10 1 * *", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T00:00:00Z"}]
